meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Teable 3.0
products.tagline: AI Spreadsheet for Business
products.summaryZh: AI 电子表格（商业版）
products.descriptionZh: 将您的业务数据转化为AI工作流和自定义应用。连接任意系统，迁移任意数据，构建完全贴合您业务需求的任何内容。
products.description: Turn your business data into AI workflows and custom apps. Connect any system, migrate any data, and build anything that fits your business 100%.

products.name: PromptQL
products.tagline: Multiplayer AI that replaces Slack
products.summaryZh: 替代Slack的多玩家AI
products.descriptionZh: 别再让团队知识分散在 Slack 和每个人的私人 AI 聊天里了。PromptQL 是面向团队的多人协作 AI：就像在共享线程中使用 Claude 或 ChatGPT。标记团队成员来审阅、纠正和优化答案，同时保留推理过程。连接数据库、SaaS 应用、编码代理和事件。PromptQL 能捕获团队隐性知识，并建议共享大脑的更新，让上下文不断累积。作用域和多用户权限确保正确的上下文对正确的人可见。
products.description: Stop splitting team knowledge between Slack and everyone's private AI chats. PromptQL is multiplayer AI for teams: think Claude or ChatGPT in shared threads. Tag teammates to review, correct, and refine answers without losing the reasoning. Connect databases, SaaS apps, coding agents, and events. PromptQL captures tribal knowledge and suggests shared-brain updates so context compounds. Scopes and multi-user permissions keep the right context accessible to the right people.

products.name: PodcastorAI
products.tagline: Your AI twin hosts your video podcast
products.summaryZh: 你的AI替身主持你的视频播客
products.descriptionZh: 从脚本、链接、PDF或创意出发，借助AI主播、自然语音和数字分身，制作工作室级别的视频播客。Podcastor负责制作流程，让你出现在屏幕上，将数小时的录制和剪辑工作压缩至约15分钟，产出成品视频播客。可制作单人或双人主持的单集，无需摄像机或制作团队，即可获得可直接发布的视频。已有音频单集？上传后，用你的声音和AI虚拟形象将其转化为视频播客。
products.description: Create studio-quality video podcasts from scripts, links, PDFs, or ideas — with AI hosts, natural voices, and your digital twin. Podcastor handles production and puts you on screen, turning hours of recording and editing into a finished video podcast in around 15 minutes. Create solo or two-host episodes and get a publish-ready video without cameras or a production team. Already have an audio episode? Upload it and transform it into a video podcast with your voice and AI avatar.

products.name: CrawlRaven
products.tagline: SEO Hub for GSC + GA4 + a 200-point crawl
products.summaryZh: SEO Hub for GSC + GA4 + 200 点爬取
products.descriptionZh: 连接Google Search Console和Google Analytics，导入Ahrefs或Semrush列表，并在200项技术SEO审计中抓取你的网站。CrawlRaven整合所有四项数据，返回一个优先级排序的计划：先写什么、更新什么、修复什么。
products.description: Connect Google Search Console, Google Analytics, import your Ahrefs or Semrush lists, and crawl your site on 200-point technical SEO Audit. CrawlRaven joins all four and hands back a ranked plan: what to write, what to update, what to fix first.

products.name: AskCodi
products.tagline: Orchestrate agents at scale while reducing cost
products.summaryZh: 大规模编排智能体，同时降低成本。
products.descriptionZh: 告诉Codi你想构建什么。它会制定计划，并行运行AI代理处理你所有项目，并为每项任务选择最便宜的模型，让你交付更多、花费更少。当你添加项目时，它会自动编写章程和任务列表，仅在需要决策时通过一个收件箱通知你。
products.description: Tell Codi what you want to build. It writes the plan, runs AI agents in parallel across all your projects, and picks the cheapest model that can do each task, so you ship more and spend less. When you add a project it writes the charter and task list itself, and only pulls you in when a decision needs you, through one inbox.

products.name: RunEvr
products.tagline: Agentic project management environment for creatives
products.summaryZh: 面向创意工作者的智能项目管理环境
products.descriptionZh: 一个由AI驱动的统一工作空间，让你的项目、对话、审阅和创意工作保持互联。每次切换工具都会打断创意思维、分散上下文信息，并增加不必要的认知负担。RunEvr旨在将整个创意工作流整合于一处，帮助团队保持专注、自然协作，并在创作中不失节奏。
products.description: One AI-powered workspace where your projects, conversations, reviews, and creative work stay connected. Every tool switch interrupts creative thinking, scatters context, and adds unnecessary cognitive load. RunEvr is built to keep your entire creative workflow in one place, helping teams stay focused, collaborate naturally, and create without losing momentum.

products.name: Moxie Docs: Knowledgebases
products.tagline: Automated documentation for developers, users, and AI Tools
products.summaryZh: 面向开发者、用户及AI工具的自动化文档
products.descriptionZh: 现在处于Beta阶段：公共站点！在 https://moxiedocs.app 创建自动生成的、面向公众的帮助中心和知识库。功能包括丰富的布局、白标定制、全文搜索，且无供应商锁定。直接与Changelog集成！示例：https://docs.moxiedocs.app 同时发布：Webhooks 与 Slack 集成，用于索引/PR提醒；UI/UX 分页与批量操作改进；数据库/基础设施升级，加载速度更快；文档生成质量持续提升。
products.description: Now in Beta: Public Sites! Create auto-generated, public-facing help centers and knowledgebases at https://moxiedocs.app. Features rich layouts, white-labelling, full search, and no vendor lock-in. Integrates directly with Changelog! Example: https://docs.moxiedocs.app Also shipped: Webhooks & Slack integration for indexing/PR alerts UI/UX pagination & bulk action improvements DB/infrastructure upgrades for faster loading Continued improvements on document generation quality

products.name: Wispro
products.tagline: Stop typing, start talking, get perfectly written text
products.summaryZh: 停止打字，开始说话，获得完美书写的文字。
products.descriptionZh: Wispro 将你的语音即时转化为文字。只需开口说话，无论内容是否杂乱、未经筛选，Wispro 都会直接将干净、可用的文本粘贴到你正在处理的内容中。它适应你的思维方式，而不仅仅是说话方式。基础模式精确记录每一个字。智能模式去除冗余词汇和漫无边际的内容，将其整理为精炼的文本。指令模式将口头指令即时转化为完整的写作内容——邮件、回复、整篇草稿，一气呵成。一种声音，三种写作方式。
products.description: Wispro turns your voice into writing, instantly. Just talk, messy or unfiltered, and Wispro pastes clean, ready-to-use text directly into whatever you're working on. It adapts to how you think, not just how you speak. Basic Mode captures every word exactly as said. Smart Mode cuts filler words and rambling, formatting it into polished prose. Command Mode turns a spoken instruction into finished writing, emails, replies, whole drafts, on the spot. One voice. Three ways to write.

products.name: Quaso
products.tagline: AI automation agent to get stuff done across apps or browser
products.summaryZh: 跨应用或浏览器的AI自动化代理，助你高效完成任务
products.descriptionZh: Quaso 能将你的繁琐工作转化为跨应用及开放网络的自动化流程。只需描述待办事项，它便会自动构建并完成配置。支持接入 3000 多个集成平台（如 Gmail、Slack、Linear、Stripe 等），在无原生 API 时可调用真实浏览器。可按计划、触发条件或按需运行。可复制模板，或将任意对话保存为个人可复用的技能。在 Slack 中 @Quaso，即可让整个团队使用该功能。只需放松，高效完成工作。
products.description: Quaso turns your busywork into automation across all of your apps and the open web. Simply prompt what needs to get done and it builds and sets it up for you. Connects to 3000+ integrations (Gmail, Slack, Linear, Stripe, etc.) and picks up a real browser when there's no native API. Runs on schedules, triggers, and on demand. Fork templates or save any thread as your own reusable skill. Tag @Quaso in Slack so your whole team can put it to work. Just relax and get stuff done.

products.name: canitbebuilt
products.tagline: Your hardware idea, inspected. Verdict, BOM, 3D model.
products.summaryZh: 你的硬件创意，已审核。结论、物料清单、3D模型。
products.descriptionZh: 有硬件创意？用一句话描述。你将获得：可行性评估（可制造/需调整/高难度/不可行）、100/1000/10000件量产成本物料清单、子系统风险评级、目标市场认证门槛，以及3D概念模型。两分钟出结果，无需注册。评估标准源自23年硬件制造经验。基于GPT-5.6 Terra运行。
products.description: Have a hardware idea? Describe it in a sentence. You get back a verdict (Buildable / Buildable with changes / Heavy lift / Not viable), a bill of materials costed at 100, 1,000 and 10,000 units, subsystem risk ratings, certification gates for your market, and a 3D concept model. Two minutes, no signup. Criteria come from 23 years of hardware building. Running on GPT-5.6 Terra.

products.name: OpenCode Superapp
products.tagline: The power of Codex with local, self-hosted models and voice
products.summaryZh: Codex 的强大功能，搭配本地自托管模型与语音支持
products.descriptionZh: OpenCode Superapp 将 Codex 的智能代理能力引入您选择的模型与基础设施。在原生工作区中，您可以运行云端、本地或自托管模型，代理能理解您的项目，处理文件、Git 和终端，通过语音与您交流，并通过受控的计算机操作（Computer Use）操控 Mac 应用。设计上注重隐私，可通过技能和 MCP 扩展，在提供强大代理的同时，不牺牲模型选择或控制权。基于 Codex 和 GPT-5.6 从零构建。
products.description: OpenCode Superapp brings the agentic power of Codex to the models and infrastructure you choose. Run cloud, local, or self-hosted models in a native workspace where agents understand your projects, work with files, Git, and terminals, speak with you through voice, and operate Mac apps through supervised Computer Use. Private by design and extensible through skills and MCPs, it gives you capable agents without giving up model choice or control. Built from the ground up with Codex and GPT-5.6.

products.name: Cosyra 2.0
products.tagline: A cloud workspace for coding agents from your phone
products.summaryZh: 来自手机的编码代理云端工作空间
products.descriptionZh: Cosyra 为云端代理提供持久化工作空间。你的仓库、分支、文件、依赖项、终端和代理工作都集中在一起。从手机端打开即可继续构建，无需让笔记本电脑保持唤醒状态。
products.description: Cosyra gives you a persistent workspace for cloud agents. Your repos, branches, files, dependencies, terminals, and agent work stay together. Open it from your phone and keep building without leaving a laptop awake.

products.name: Squishy
products.tagline: the screen time pet you keep alive with someone
products.summaryZh: 与他人共同养活的屏幕时间宠物
products.descriptionZh: Squishy是一款应用和网站屏蔽工具，其吉祥物的心情会随你的选择而变化。专注使用能帮助它恢复活力，而打开被屏蔽的应用或网站则会消耗它的能量。你可以与伴侣、朋友或家人共享同一只Squishy，双方共同为同一个心情值做出贡献，同时浏览细节保持私密。一份订阅覆盖拥有者及一位受邀伙伴，并支持在iPhone、iPad、Android和Chrome之间同步。
products.description: Squishy is an app and website blocker with a mascot whose happiness follows your choices. Focus helps it recover. Opening blocked apps or sites drains it. Share one Squishy with a partner, friend, or family member, and both of you contribute to the same happiness bar while browsing details stay private. One subscription covers the owner and one invited partner, with sync across iPhone, iPad, Android, and Chrome.

products.name: Basement
products.tagline: Shopping browser with agentic checkout
products.summaryZh: 具备代理结账功能的购物浏览器
products.descriptionZh: Basement 现已升级为购物浏览器。今天我们推出智能结账功能：你的 AI 购物助手会在全网寻找最优价格并代为下单。每笔交易使用一次性卡片，仅限单次订单使用，确保你的真实卡片信息永不泄露，消费金额也不会超出你设定的预算。所有支付记录集中管理。由 Crossmint 提供技术支持。它了解你的喜好。现在，它能替你下单。已在 iOS 和 Chrome 上线。
products.description: Basement is now a shopping browser. Today we launch agentic checkout: your AI shopper finds the best price across the web and buys it for you. Every purchase runs on a single-use card scoped to one order, so your real card is never exposed and nothing goes beyond the budget you set. Every payment lands in one place. Powered by Crossmint. It knows what you like. Now it can buy it. Live on iOS and Chrome.

products.name: Basedash AI Kit
products.tagline: Ship AI analytics in your product, powered by GPT-5.6
products.summaryZh: 在你的产品中集成AI分析功能，由GPT-5.6驱动。
products.descriptionZh: Basedash是AI分析平台——支持与AI数据分析师对话、自动生成每日洞察、自动化流程及仪表盘。现在所有这些功能均可通过API调用。用完全自定义的UI为产品打造面向客户的分析功能，或以任何工具未曾预见的方式扩展内部BI。发送问题、流式获取答案、渲染图表——每次查询都限定在对应客户范围内。在BI Bench排名第一，由GPT-5.6驱动。AI数据分析师，现在可供您构建。
products.description: Basedash is the AI analytics platform — chat with an AI data analyst, automatic daily insights, automations, and dashboards. Now all of it is available through the API. Power your product's customer-facing analytics with a fully custom UI, or extend your internal BI in ways no tool anticipated. Send a question, stream the answer, render the chart — every query scoped to the right customer. Ranked #1 on BI Bench and powered by GPT-5.6. The AI data analyst, now yours to build on.

products.name: HonorBox
products.tagline: Sell digital products with just Stripe and GitHub
products.summaryZh: 仅需Stripe和GitHub即可销售数字产品
products.descriptionZh: 你的店面是 GitHub Pages 上的静态网站。结账流程使用你自己账户下的 Stripe 支付链接。定时运行的 GitHub Action 通过邀请买家加入你的私有仓库来完成每笔交易。
products.description: Your storefront is a static site on GitHub Pages. Checkout is a Stripe Payment Link on your own account. A scheduled GitHub Action delivers each sale by inviting the buyer to your private repo.

products.name: Megaphone
products.tagline: Open-source Mac dictation App that's 100% on-device
products.summaryZh: 开源Mac听写应用，完全本地运行
products.descriptionZh: 按住Fn键说话，Megaphone即可将纯净文本输入任何Mac应用。Apple的SpeechAnalyzer会在您说话时进行转录，同时设备端Foundation Models会移除填充词、修正自我纠正、适应应用上下文，并支持内联语音指令。无需账户、API密钥、订阅或服务器。免费、MIT许可，原生支持运行macOS 26的Apple Silicon Mac。
products.description: Hold Fn, speak, and Megaphone types clean text into any Mac app. Apple’s SpeechAnalyzer transcribes as you talk, while on-device Foundation Models remove fillers, fix self-corrections, adapt to app context, and power inline voice commands. No account, API key, subscription, or server. Free, MIT-licensed, and native to Apple silicon Macs running macOS 26.

products.name: HOL Guard
products.tagline: The 1st Firewall for AI Agents
products.summaryZh: 首个面向AI智能体的防火墙
products.descriptionZh: HOL Guard 是面向AI代理的防火墙。它部署在代理与系统之间，在删除生产数据、泄露机密等高危行为发生前予以拦截。由HOL开发，免费开源，下载量已超40万次。
products.description: HOL Guard is the firewall for AI agents. It sits between agents and your systems, blocking high-risk actions before they happen like deleting production data to exposing secrets. Built by HOL, it’s free, open source, and already has 400K+ downloads.

products.name: AgentLoop
products.tagline: Starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle
products.summaryZh: 启动一个新的Codex工作进程，并在每个周期进行审查。
products.descriptionZh: 与长期运行的智能体对话不同，AgentLoop 在每个周期都会启动全新的 Codex 工作进程和评审进程。只需设定一次目标和 GUIDELINES.md 评估标准；工作进程负责构建，评审进程负责测试，失败结果会转化为具体的修复说明，供下一个干净的上下文使用。项目文件承载记忆。运行过程保持本地化、沙盒化、可观察，并可通过实时仪表盘取消，同时通过 MCP 实现 ChatGPT 控制。优化模式可在通过 PASS 后继续运行，直到评审进程给出 SHIP 指令。开源且零依赖的 Node.js。
products.description: Unlike long-running agent chats, AgentLoop starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle. Set the goal and GUIDELINES.md rubric once; workers build, critics test, and failures become concrete fix notes for the next clean context. Project files carry the memory. Runs stay local, sandboxed, observable, and cancellable from a live dashboard, with ChatGPT control through MCP. Polish mode can continue beyond PASS until the critic says SHIP. Open source and zero-dependency Node.js.

products.name: Blaxel Agent Drive
products.tagline: A shared filesystem for AI agents
products.summaryZh: AI智能体共享文件系统
products.descriptionZh: 在多个沙盒间挂载同一分布式文件系统，支持并发读写访问。智能体可通过常规文件系统路径共享文件、工具输出、数据集及上下文信息。
products.description: Mount one distributed filesystem across multiple sandboxes with concurrent read-write access. Agents can share files, tool outputs, datasets, and context through a normal filesystem path.
